description: Hand-editable catalog of open/public trail-camera and camera-trap data sources. Most entries are static public datasets, not live query APIs.

databases.name: LILA BC camera-trap catalog
databases.notes: Catalog CSV for LILA camera-trap datasets. Use this to discover many more LILA-hosted datasets.

databases.name: Caltech Camera Traps
databases.notes: COCO Camera Traps metadata. About 243k images and 21 animal categories plus empty.

databases.name: North American Camera Trap Images / NACTI
databases.notes: COCO Camera Traps metadata. About 3.7M images from five U.S. locations with species labels.

databases.name: WCS Camera Traps
databases.notes: COCO Camera Traps metadata. Around 1.4M images from WCS projects.

databases.name: Snapshot Serengeti
databases.notes: Large public Snapshot Serengeti release. Config includes known public metadata files and image base URL. Add more metadata package URLs as needed.

databases.name: Wildlife Insights public data downloads
databases.notes: Public downloads are available. Sensitive data can be obscured/removed; sensitive-location access requires project-owner approval. No general public search REST API is declared here.

databases.name: Smithsonian eMammal browse/download data
databases.notes: Public browse/download site. Some coordinates are fuzzed for sensitive deployments. No general public REST API is declared here.
